top_signals.title: Ambani’s $4 Billion Jio IPO Hits Roadblocks on Iran War Impact
top_signals.summary: Reliance Industries Ltd.’s plan to sell shares in digital arm Jio Platforms Ltd. — potentially India’s biggest-ever initial public offering — is running into a thicket of challenges exacerbated by the war in Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
